description: Style Note An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to jazz up your outfit. This genuine leather belt from lee is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Product Details Made of leather for durability and style Tang clasp with a fixed leather loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand logo embossed on the tail end of the belt Material and Care Genuine leather Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Use a leather conditioner to protect the leatherSizeWidth: 3.5 cm
